title: pelargonium × euryphyllum
intro: Pelargonium × euryphyllum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium plant family, characterized by its fragrant, rose-like flowers and distinctive leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include alleviating stress, anxiety, and menstrual cramps, as well as promoting better sleep and digestion. Rose Geranium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
